zh.lifeSummary: 當John Walter Stratton於大約1320年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可韋斯頓 隆維爾時，他的父親Sir Geoffrey de Staunton19歲，母親Margery Stratton19歲。他於1346年之後與Isabel Loudham在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1360年在英國英格蘭素福爾可列文頓享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特赫頓聖 瑪麗 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Stratton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of several places called Stratton or Stretton, almost all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, Roman road’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Stratton in Cornwall, which may also be a partial source of the surname, probably has as its first element Cornish stras ‘valley’.

English: variant of Sturton, a habitational name from Sturton le Steeple (Nottinghamshire), Great Sturton (Lincolnshire), Sturton by Stow (Lincolnshire), or possibly Sturton (Northumberland), all of which placenames share the same etymology and early spellings as 1 above.

Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘street, Roman road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Straiton
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Straiton (Ayrshire), Straiton in Liberton (Midlothian), or South Straiton in Logie (Fife), all named with Old English strǣt ‘paved road, street’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Stratton .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Walter Stratton was born about 1320, in Weston Longville, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Geoffrey de Staunton, was 19 and his mother, Margery Stratton, was 19. He married Isabel Loudham after 1346, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1360, in Levington, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in St Mary Churchyard, Hutton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Walter Stratton est né environ 1320, à Weston Longville, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Geoffrey de Staunton, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margery Stratton, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Loudham après 1346, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1360, à Levington, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary Churchyard, Hutton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Walter Strattonが約1320年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウエストン ロングヴィルで生まれた時，父Sir Geoffrey de Stauntonは19歳，母Margery Strattonは19歳であった。1346年以後にイギリスでIsabel Loudhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1360年にイギリスイギリススフォルクレヴィントンで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトハットオンスト マリー チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Mary Churchyard, Shotley, Babergh, S: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 후턴 스트 메리 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: John Walter Stratton(이)가 대략 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 웨스턴 론그빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey de Staunton(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Stratton(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1346년 이후 영국에서 Isabel Loudham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레빙턴에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 후턴 스트 메리 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Isabel Loudham após 1346, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.St. Mary Churchyard, Shotley, Babergh, S: ст мэри чурчярд, хуттон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Walter Stratton родился около 1320 г. в местности вестон лонгвилл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey de Staunton было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Stratton, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Loudham после 1346 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1360 г. в местности левингтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности ст мэри чурчярд, хуттон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
